summary: Comprehensive testing of Legal Pages (Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions) and SMS Consent Checkbox feature for Twilio A2P 10DLC compliance - All features working correctly
passed_tests: Privacy Policy page renders at /privacy with correct title and content ✓
Privacy Policy page has Section 4 (SMS/Text Messaging) with A2P compliance content ✓
Privacy Policy page has 'Back' navigation link (data-testid='privacy-back-link') ✓
Privacy Policy page has cross-link to Terms of Service (data-testid='privacy-to-terms-link') ✓
Cross-link from Privacy to Terms navigates correctly ✓
Terms of Service page renders at /terms with correct title and content ✓
Terms of Service page has Section 4 (SMS Communications Consent) with A2P compliance content ✓
Terms of Service page has 'Back' navigation link (data-testid='terms-back-link') ✓
Terms of Service page has cross-link to Privacy Policy (data-testid='terms-to-privacy-link') ✓
Cross-link from Terms to Privacy navigates correctly ✓
Signup page shows SMS consent checkbox (data-testid='sms-consent-checkbox') ✓
SMS consent checkbox initial state is unchecked ✓
SMS consent checkbox toggles to checked state with gold color (#d4af37) when clicked ✓
SMS consent checkbox toggles back to unchecked state when clicked again ✓
SMS consent label includes link to Terms of Service (data-testid='signup-terms-link') ✓
SMS consent label includes link to Privacy Policy (data-testid='signup-privacy-link') ✓
Signup form validation blocks submission when SMS consent not checked ✓
Toast error 'Please agree to the SMS and terms consent to continue' displayed correctly ✓
Signup page footer has Privacy Policy link (data-testid='signup-footer-privacy-link') ✓
Signup page footer has Terms of Service link (data-testid='signup-footer-terms-link') ✓
Login page footer has Privacy Policy link (data-testid='login-footer-privacy-link') ✓
Login page footer has Terms of Service link (data-testid='login-footer-terms-link') ✓
Footer links on Login page navigate to correct pages ✓
Footer links on Signup page navigate to correct pages ✓
Terms and Privacy links in consent label navigate correctly ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal pages feature fully implemented with Privacy Policy (/privacy) and Terms of Service (/terms) public routes. SMS consent checkbox on signup page is a custom button-based checkbox (not native HTML) with gold (#d4af37) color when checked. Form validation uses toast.error() for client-side enforcement. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing.

signup_sms_consent.validation_message: Please agree to the SMS and terms consent to continue

screenshots: .screenshots/privacy_page.png - Privacy Policy page with SMS section visible
.screenshots/terms_page.png - Terms of Service page with SMS consent section visible
.screenshots/signup_sms_consent.png - Signup page with SMS consent checkbox
.screenshots/signup_validation_error.png - Toast error when consent not checked
.screenshots/login_footer_links.png - Login page with footer legal links
